sections.content: Good progress. The white-bordered purple dot is now at (54,28). Let me check if there's another magenta dot closer to the gray end at (59,27), or if the white-bordered dot is now adjacent to the gray-bordered dot and I need to click the gray one directly.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Key objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 25 and n['color'] not in ('B', 'g'):
        center_row = sum(b[0] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_col = sum(b[1] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} ~({center_row},{center_col}) children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
